DISCOVERY 302, MOTION FOR ORDER TO COMPEL DISCOVERY IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHALL SERVE VERIFIED AMENDED RESPONSES TO ALL DISCOVERY AT ISSUE WITHIN 20 DAYS OF SERVICE OF THIS ORDER. IF DOCUMENTS ARE BEING WITHHELD PURSUANT TO A CLAIM OF PRIVILEGE OR WORK PRODUCT PROTECTION, PLAINTIFF SHALL PRODUCE A PRIVILEGE LOG IDENTIFYING, AT A MINIMUM: 1) TYPE OF DOCUMENT (E.G., EMAIL), 2) LENGTH, 3) PREPARER, 4) RECIPIENT, 5) GENERAL SUBJECT MATTER AND 6) LEGAL REASON FOR WITHHOLDING. SANCTIONS ARE GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,185 PAYABLE BY DEFENDANT TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL WITHIN 15 DAYS OF SERVICE OF THIS ORDER. COUNSEL SHALL PREPARE THE PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: CHARLES GEERHART; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302.

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2017 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-17-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-07-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Order To Compel Discovery
Off Calendar Aug-18-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Joseph T. Urbanic, of Glassberg, Pollak & Associates, Tel. 415.291.8320 ext. 212, for plaintiffs, appearing via CourtCall;
John G. Warner, of Law Offices of John G. Warner, Tel. 415.924.2640, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. PLAINTIFF HARTFORD INSURANCE COMPANY OF THE MIDWEST, Motion For Order To Compel Discovery is granted. Defendant shall serve verified amended responses to all discovery at issue within 20 days of service of this order. If documents are being withheld pursuant to a claim of privilege or work product protection, plaintiff shall produce a privilege log identifying, at a minimum: 1) type of document (e.g., email), 2) length, 3) preparer, 4) recipient, 5) general subject matter and 6) legal reason for withholding. Sanctions are granted in the amount of $1,185 payable by defendant to plaintiff's counsel within 15 days of service of this order. Counsel shall prepare the proposed order. Judge Pro Tem: Charles Geerhart; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-02-2016 Set For Trial On Oct-17-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
